key_notes: Wild-bird dominated backbone; spans 2021-12-30 to 2023-10-18; repeatedly seeds poultry outbreaks; rare wild-mammal spillovers.
Core dairy/cattle-enriched variant; Texas dairy-cow detections start 2024-03-10; spans 2022-12-19 to 2025-03-02; retains avian component indicating bidirectional exchange.
Largest non-cattle clade; spans 2022-07-02 to 2025-03-02; mostly avian but broad spillover (cats, wild mammals, humans); no sustained dairy-cow circulation.
Dairy-branch subclade; spans 2024-07-02 to 2025-03-02; DM-dominant with clustered human cases.
Near-exclusive dairy-cow circulation; spans 2024-07-02 to 2025-03-02; limited spillback into birds.
Dairy-branch subclade; spans 2024-07-02 to 2025-03-02; DM-dominant with multiple human cases.
Early avian-dominated variant; spans 2022-04-04 to 2022-12-28; not detected after 2022, consistent with a transient lineage.
Smaller dairy/cattle-enriched variant; spans 2024-07-02 to 2025-03-02; primarily dairy cows with occasional bird detections.
Avian-dominated pre-dairy variant; spans 2022-07-02 to 2024-01-18; no cattle; mainly wild birds.
Avian-dominated variant emerging pre-dairy; spans 2023-09-20 to 2024-07-02; no cattle; occasional wild-mammal detections.
